title: AP Adds or Updates Product Pricing - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Product Pricing and Quantity feature for Assistive Partners (APs) on the PwD Catalog Portal. Covers Edit Pricing & Quantity popup, quantity validation, pricing input options (Single Price, Price Range, Custom Label), currency formatting, geographic availability, display on product pages, real-time updates, and accessibility compliance.

inScope: Access to Edit Pricing & Quantity from Product Management
Pricing Input Options (Single Price, Price Range, Custom Label)
Validation for numeric and text inputs
Display on PwD Product Details Page
Real-time pricing updates without Pending Review
Geographic Availability with search and tags
outOfScope: Admin audit trail export (requires admin access)

prerequisites: Valid AP account with approved status

testCases.title: Verify Edit Pricing & Quantity option in Product Management action column
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with existing products
steps: Locate a product in the list
Verify 'Edit Pricing & Quantity' option in action column
expectedResults: Product is visible in the list
Edit Pricing & Quantity option is visible in action column
testCases.postconditions: Edit Pricing & Quantity option is accessible

testCases.title: Verify Edit Pricing & Quantity popup opens on click
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Click 'Edit Pricing & Quantity' option for a product
Verify popup contains pricing and quantity fields

testCases.title: Verify Available Quantity field accepts numeric values only
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
testCases.defectNotes: Application accepts alphabetic characters (abc) and special characters (@#$%) in the Available Quantity field without validation. The field should only accept numeric values.

testCases.title: Verify Available Quantity does not accept negative numbers
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup

testCases.title: Verify Made to Order disables Available Quantity field
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Locate 'Made to Order (No fixed inventory)' option
Verify Available Quantity field is disabled or ignored
expectedResults: Made to Order option is visible
testCases.postconditions: Quantity field is disabled when Made to Order selected

testCases.title: Verify Quantity is not mandatory when Made to Order is selected
testCases.preconditions: User has selected Made to Order
steps: Verify no validation error for quantity
testCases.postconditions: Quantity not required for Made to Order

testCases.title: Verify Quantity is mandatory when Made to Order is NOT selected
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Ensure Made to Order is NOT selected
expectedResults: Made to Order is not selected
testCases.postconditions: Quantity required when not Made to Order

testCases.title: Verify Price Range dropdown options
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Verify options: Single Price, Price Range, Custom label
expectedResults: Options: Single Price, Price Range, Custom label are available

testCases.title: Verify Single Price numeric field
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup

testCases.title: Verify Price Range Min and Max fields
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Verify Min and Max fields appear
expectedResults: Min and Max fields are visible

testCases.title: Verify Custom label text input
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup

testCases.title: Verify currency formatting with INR symbol
testCases.preconditions: User has entered price value

testCases.title: Verify decimal and comma separators in currency formatting
testCases.preconditions: User has entered price value

testCases.title: Verify numeric validation prevents non-numeric characters in price
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
expectedResults: Error message: 'Please enter a valid number'
testCases.defectNotes: Application accepts non-numeric characters in price field without validation error. When 'abc' or '12abc' is entered, the system shows 'Pricing updated successfully' instead of validation error.

testCases.title: Verify both Min and Max required for Price Range
testCases.preconditions: User has selected Price Range option
expectedResults: Error: Both Min and Max are required

testCases.title: Verify Custom label character limit (25 characters)
testCases.preconditions: User has selected Custom label option
steps: Attempt to enter more than 25 characters

testCases.title: Verify pricing displays on PwD Product Details Page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC6 - Display on PwD Product Details Page
testCases.preconditions: Product has pricing information set
steps: Set Single Price for a product (e.g., ₹12,000)
View product as PwD user would see it
testCases.postconditions: Price is visible to PwD users

testCases.title: Verify Price Range display format on Product Details
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC6 - Display on PwD Product Details Page
testCases.preconditions: Product has price range set

testCases.title: Verify Custom label display on Product Details
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC6 - Display on PwD Product Details Page
testCases.preconditions: Product has custom label set

testCases.title: Verify Pricing section is hidden when no price provided
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC6 - Display on PwD Product Details Page
testCases.preconditions: Product has no pricing information
steps: Ensure product has no price set
Verify Pricing Information section is not visible

testCases.title: Verify starting price display on Catalog Card
testCases.preconditions: Product has price range set
steps: Verify starting price display on card
expectedResults: Card shows: 'Starting at ₹10,000' in small text

testCases.title: Verify single price display on Catalog Card
testCases.preconditions: Product has single price set
expectedResults: Card shows: '₹12,000 approx.' in small text

testCases.title: Verify no placeholder on Catalog Card when price is blank
testCases.preconditions: Product has no pricing information
steps: Ensure product has no price set

testCases.title: Verify AP can update pricing from action column
testCases.preconditions: Product has existing pricing
steps: Click Edit Pricing & Quantity for product with price
expectedResults: Edit popup opens with existing price

testCases.title: Verify AP can remove pricing
testCases.preconditions: Product has existing pricing

testCases.title: Verify pricing updates do NOT trigger Pending Review status
testCases.preconditions: Product is in Approved/Published status

testCases.title: Verify pricing changes are visible in real time on catalog
testCases.preconditions: Product is published on catalog
steps: Verify new price is displayed immediately

testCases.title: Verify Geographic Availability search functionality
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Type to search for a location

testCases.title: Verify multiple location selection for Geographic Availability
testCases.preconditions: User is in Geographic Availability section
testCases.defectNotes: Geographic Availability section is NOT implemented in the Edit Pricing & Quantity popup. The feature does not exist in the current UI.

testCases.title: Verify selected locations display as removable tags
testCases.preconditions: User has selected multiple locations
steps: Verify locations appear as tags below input
expectedResults: Tags are displayed below input field
Remove (X) button is visible on each tag
Location is removed when X is clicked

testCases.title: Verify pricing fields have clear labels
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Verify each field has a clear label
Verify labels are associated with fields

testCases.title: Verify proper currency symbols and text spacing
testCases.preconditions: Product has pricing displayed
expectedResults: Spacing between symbol and number is correct

testCases.title: Verify accessible tooltips/help text for pricing
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
expectedResults: Text: 'Price is optional. Provide approximate or range if available.'

testCases.title: Verify keyboard navigation for pricing fields
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Navigate through fields using Tab key
expectedResults: Form can be completed without mouse

testCases.title: Verify screen reader compatibility for pricing fields
testCases.preconditions: Screen reader is enabled
steps: Verify labels and values are read correctly

testCases.title: Verify error message for invalid price input
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
expectedResults: Error: 'Please enter a valid number or select a text option like Contact for Pricing.'

testCases.title: Verify form prevents submission with invalid values
testCases.preconditions: User has entered invalid data

testCases.title: Verify price field is non-mandatory (optional)
testCases.preconditions: User has opened Edit Pricing & Quantity popup
steps: Fill other required fields (quantity if needed)
expectedResults: No validation error for empty price

testCases.title: Verify products without pricing are publishable
testCases.preconditions: Product has no pricing set
steps: Verify product is discoverable on catalog

testCases.title: Verify no missing field validation for blank pricing
testCases.preconditions: User is editing product

testCases.title: Verify Min value cannot be greater than Max in Price Range
testCases.preconditions: User has selected Price Range option
steps: Enter Min value greater than Max (e.g., Min: 20000, Max: 10000)
expectedResults: Error: Min cannot be greater than Max

testCases.title: Verify complete Edit Pricing & Quantity flow end-to-end
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with products
steps: Click Edit Pricing & Quantity for a product
Select Price Range and enter Min/Max
Verify changes on product details page

traceabilityMatrix.AC10_Audit_Trail: Out of Scope - Requires Admin Access

userAccounts: Approved Assistive Partner account with existing products
productData: Products in various states (Draft, Approved, Published)
pricingData: Custom labels (e.g., 'Contact for details', 'Price on request')
Invalid price inputs for error testing (e.g., '12abc', negative numbers)
locationData: State and city names for geographic availability

assumptions: AP account has been approved and has existing products
Products are in various states for testing
Geographic availability master data is populated
risks: Real-time update verification depends on catalog refresh behavior
Currency formatting may vary based on locale settings
openQuestions: What is the exact behavior when Min equals Max in price range?
Is there a maximum value limit for prices?
How does multi-currency support work for international vendors?
What happens to existing pricing when switching between pricing options?
